revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-2-040

A mirror which directs on to an optical system light emitted by the light source in directions other than that of the optical system, so as to increase the luminous intensity or the angle of divergence (or both) of the beam.

[[Image:Ch2_Fig13.jpg|400px|border]]


{{IALAFooter}}
